Example: Coach Tip: Serve must bounce in the diagonal box.

Meaning: Basic attacking shot from the dominant side
Example: Coach Tip: Use your forehand to control direction and power.

Meaning: Shot played from the opposite side of the body
Example: Coach Tip: Keep your body balanced on the backhand.

Meaning: Shot played before the ball bounces
Example: Coach Tip: Stay close to the net and keep the racket stable.

Meaning: Learn the main zones of the court
Example: Coach Tip: Good positioning improves your next shot.
Coach Tip: Learn how points move from 15 to game.
